body:
Based on recent local data and national averages adjusted for the higher cost of living in the San Francisco Bay Area (including Pleasanton), here is a breakdown of full garage door replacement costs in 2026:

  * **Average Cost Range:** A typical full garage door replacement, including installation, often falls between **$1,500 and $3,500+** per door, depending on materials and insulation.
  * **Single Door (7x8):** A standard single-car metal garage door replacement, including labor, typically ranges from **$1,400 to $1,600** for basic models, though higher-end options can increase the price.
  * **Custom or Upgraded Doors:** More customized doors, such as those with glass panels or specialized materials, can start at **$3,000 or higher**.
  * **Optional Upgrades:** Adding a new, high-quality garage door opener can add to the total, with some premium, direct-drive systems being a popular choice for durability. [Garage door replacement price and recommendation - Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/r/SanJose/comments/1iul17w/garage_door_replacement_price_and_recommendation/)[Garage Door Installation Cost: Is It Worth It? - NerdWallet](https://www.nerdwallet.com/home-ownership/home-improvement/learn/garage-door-installation-cost)[Garage Door Installation Cost (5 Things To Expect In 2026)](https://pdqdoor.com/blog/garage-door-installation-cost/)[Cost of Front Door Replacement: SE Pennsylvania Guide](https://keystonewindow.com/cost-of-front-door-replacement/)[How Much Does a Garage Conversion Cost? (2026)](https://homeguide.com/costs/cost-to-convert-or-finish-a-garage)

**Factors Influencing Price:**

  * **Material:** Aluminum and steel are generally less expensive than wood or composite, which can go up to $5,000+.
  * **Insulation:** Insulated doors cost more but are common in the area for energy efficiency.
  * **Labor:** Installation labor costs in California are generally higher than the national average. [New Garage Door Cost: 2026 Price & Feature Guide](https://alansfactoryoutlet.com/blog/garage-door-cost/?srsltid=AfmBOoq_Q-zRSBcTtl1LItA6fqGauJ_eA8bWyR1IItBvs0wfg8qVvUEM)[Table of Contents: How Much Does a 2 Car Garage Door Replacement Cost?](https://ohdbellingham.com/blog/2-car-garage-door-replacement-cost/)[Residential Garage Doors](https://overheaddoordenver.com/residential-garage-doors/)[Garage Door Price Guide - What to Expect](https://www.clopaydoor.com/residential/garage-door-price-guide)[How Much Does It Cost To Replace a Garage Door in 2024? | Amarr](https://blog.amarr.com/how-much-does-it-cost-to-replace-a-garage-door)

**Pro-Tip:** Get a detailed estimate from local, highly-rated technicians (e.g., ones offering free on-site quotes) to compare pricing on both the door itself and the installation labor.

To provide a more precise estimate, are you looking to replace a **single-car** or **two-car** door? Also, do you have a preference for materials (like **wood** , **steel** , or **glass**) or need **insulation**?
